channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls eye fresh positions after BTC price drops under $71K
item.description: Selling from all angles pushed Bitcoin below $71,000 at the weekly open, but early bullish positioning in BTC derivatives may signal the start of a recovery.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: Dogecoin gains Paxos support in push for broader institutional adoption
item.description: The integration gives fintech and institutional platforms a new pathway to evaluate DOGE amid signs of slowing crypto adoption.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Debate on CLARITY Act continues this week as US Senate returns
item.description: Many Democratic lawmakers have said that they will not support any version of a crypto market structure bill without provisions on ethics to address potential conflicts of interest by elected officials.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bitcoin volatility is down 56% but analysts still expect up to 20% BTC price move
item.description: Bitcoin’s sharp volatility decline coincides with a 114-day trading range, setting the stage for a potential 10% to 20% price move, but the direction remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Japan’s ruling party pushes crypto ETFs, yen-denominated stablecoins
item.description: The Parliamentary Association for the Promotion of Blockchain delivered recommendations to Japan’s finance minister on crypto and blockchain.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Strategy's BTC sale turns Bitcoin treasury into market stress test
item.description: Strategy’s 32 BTC transaction has sparked debate over how investors value Bitcoin treasury companies as capital structure and liquidity considerations evolve.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Are Ethereum OGs jumping ship? Here's what the data says
item.description: Long-term whales have cashed out millions of dollars from Ethereum following the recent sell-off, potentially putting ETH at risk of further losses.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE breakout puts $100 price target in play
item.description: HYPE has entered the breakout stage of its prevailing bull pennant setup with an upside target near $105, with strong fundamentals backing the bullish case.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: Recovery hopes fade as Kelp DAO hacker launders nearly all $220M in stolen funds
item.description: The Kelp DAO exploiter laundered about $220 million worth of remaining stolen funds in a bid to make them untraceable, excluding the $71 million frozen by Arbitrum’s Security Council.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Strategy sells 32 BTC in first Bitcoin sale since 2022; Stock falls on open
item.description: The world's largest public Bitcoin holder reduced its stash to 843,706 BTC, while raising $128.3 million through Class A stock sales.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Gnosis Pay exploit hits delay module as team pledges refunds
item.description: Gnosis Pay faces an active exploit in its delay module as co‑founder Martin Köppelmann walks back a warning urging users to withdraw funds and vows to repay those affected.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Crypto meets Wall Street: MEXC unveils 'RealStocks' with 0-fee U.S. equity trading and real dividends
item.description: MEXC, a leading 0-fee cross-asset trading platform, today announced the official launch of 'RealStocks.'
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
item.description: Crypto ETPs see $1.67 billion in outflows as the US dominates selling, Bitcoin funds log a record 2026 exit, and altcoin participation narrows sharply across markets, according to CoinShares.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Binance adds US stock trading in push beyond crypto
item.description: Binance launched US equities trading for eligible users and plans tokenized stocks as crypto exchanges expand into broader financial markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
item.description: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: Coinbase launches rupee bank rails in India after FIU nod
item.description: Coinbase has switched on direct rupee bank transfers in India via IMPS, letting users move funds between local bank accounts and the exchange for spot and futures trading.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Trump says Iran will ‘work out well’: Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
item.description: Bitcoin price headed below $72,000 on Iran woes as US President Donald Trump told observers to "sit back and relax" with a ceasefire still unresolved.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: NYDIG suggests $1.3B IBIT sale was whale exiting directional trade
item.description: NYDIG’s Greg Cipolaro says a sale below market price and giving up millions of dollars for immediate execution indicates a large directional holder exited a trade on BlackRock’s IBIT last week.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Anchorage rolls out platform to reduce crypto trading counterparty risk
item.description: The crypto bank's new CMS platform lets institutions trade on crypto venues while keeping assets in regulated custody and reducing pre-funded accounts.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Bitwise completes takeover of Superstate's $259M crypto carry fund
item.description: The transition gives the asset manager control of a tokenized fund that combines crypto carry trades with Treasury and digital asset exposure.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar

item.title: Sui Foundation says ‘major upgrade’ fixed bugs behind three outages
item.description: The Sui Network's first two outages were caused by bugs introduced in its 1.72 update, while an interim fix deployed to restore the blockchain triggered the third.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Crypto exploit losses in May fall 90% over month to $68M: CertiK
item.description: CertiK says May is the third month so far in 2026 to record crypto losses under $100 million.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Cardano Foundation cancels annual conference after failed funding vote
item.description: Cardano Foundation has failed at its second attempt to secure funding from Cardano’s community to fund its annual conference.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Wintermute to bring liquidity to booming prediction markets sector
item.description: Wintermute said it will provide “two-sided markets across event contracts on leading venues,” but did not specify what platforms it was trading on.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: White hat hacker recovers $2M from faulty 2016 ICO smart contract
item.description: A white-hat hacker has helped the creators of Hong Coin by showing them how to exploit a flawed admin function on a smart contract and ultimately refund investors after a decade.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: US, UK central bankers offer contrary views on stablecoins
item.description: Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller told a conference on Sunday that stablecoins expand the reach of US policy while the Bank of England’s Megan Greene expects their popularity will soon fade.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
item.description: Strategy may be set to announce it has resumed buying Bitcoin after pausing in recent weeks as the biggest crypto looks poised to close out the month down more than 3.5%.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Kraken ‘plans’ regulated perp contracts as rivals are quick off blocks
item.description: In the wake of CFTC approval of perpetual futures contracts tied to the spot price of Bitcoin, Kraken expects to offer those to US institutional clients within "the next month."
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Bitcoin preps 3% May downside, but US PMI data may boost BTC price
item.description: Bitcoin faced ending May lower by around 3%, with the possibility of US PMI data giving BTC price action a boost next week.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg
